title: Haageocereus kagenekii
taxonomy: Haageocereus kagenekii is classified as a species of cactus in the genus Haageocereus. It belongs to the family Cactaceae and the order Caryophyllales. The plant is native to Mexico and is a type of epiphytic cactus. It is closely related to other species in the Haageocereus genus, such as Haageocereus pseudomelanocentrus. The classification of Haageocereus kagenekii reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a member of the Cactaceae family.
